---
name: Feature request (Epic)
about: Propose a new feature or epic
title: "Epic: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage", "epic"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the feature or epic you're proposing.

## Use Case & Rationale
Explain why this is needed and who benefits.

## Requirements & Acceptance Criteria
List high-level requirements and what success looks like.

## Alternatives Considered
What other solutions have you considered?

## Impact & Dependencies
Mention any affected areas and dependencies.

## Additional Notes
Add any mockups, references, or related information.
